subcodes.first_line: The curse of God be upon the people who have come between Us and you. May God destroy those servants who have wronged you and become a veil betwixt you and Us [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لعن الله قوما حالوا بیننا و بینکم قاتل الله عباد الذین ظلموکم و صاروا حجابا بینکم و بین
